sanskrit:
नैव तस्य कृतेनार्थो नाकृतेन इह कश्चन।
न चास्य सर्वभूतेषु कश्चिदर्थव्यपाश्रयः॥
transliteration: naiva tasya kṛtenārtho nākṛteneha kaścana | na cāsya sarva-bhūteṣu kaścid artha-vyapāśrayaḥ ||
literal_meaning: For him there is no purpose gained by doing, nor any lost by not doing; nor does he depend on any being for any purpose.
contextual_meaning: The self-realized person is intrinsically secure; action or inaction neither adds nor subtracts from inner worth, eliminating performance-based anxiety.
psychological_state: Secure-functioning: stable self-esteem untied to productivity or approval.
trigger_scenario: You skip a networking event and feel zero FOMO because your value isn’t contingent on contacts made.
anchor_text: Your worth is complete; nothing you do can add or take away.
